{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Saeya's sword
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Saeya uses a rainbow sword.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Saeya uses a colored glass [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“Tidewalkers and Ghost-Blades,” Naru Saeya observed, hefting her colored glass sword.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
